info.name: Voting API
info.description:
Demonstrates every endpoint defined in app/openapi.yaml with a 2xx happy path plus at least one error case.  Endpoints that accept a JSON body have a 400 case showing input-format protection.

Run the requests in order (Collection Runner does this automatically) after starting the server with `python run.py`.  Each run uses a fresh `run_suffix` so it can be replayed against the same database.

exec: // Generate a per-run suffix so user/email values stay unique

item.name: Bob casts vote  (201) — for /votes/{id} ownership tests later

pm.test('Error has code and message', function () {
pm.test('Error has code and message', function () {
pm.test('Error has code and message', function () {
pm.test('Error has code and message', function () {
